name: Breaking News
description: Urgent news / announcement style, red accent, one big headline. Best for surprising facts or 'did you know' hooks.

name: AI / Tech
description: Minimal tech look with a vector-space graph and a short uppercase label. Best for AI / ML / tech concept explainers.

name: Prediction / Question
description: Bold question headline (e.g. 'Chi vince il mondiale?'). Best for prediction, versus or open-question videos.

name: Se lo capisce Mia Nonna
description: Fixed series brand — simple explainer 'if grandma gets it, you do too'. Use for the recurring explainer series.

name: Io non sono benestante
description: Fixed series brand — finance / markets ticker aesthetic. Use for the recurring finance series.

name: NBA Prediction
description: Fixed series brand — sports / NBA playoff prediction. Use for the recurring sports series.

name: Quanto ci scommetti?
description: Fixed series brand — 'how much do you bet?' prediction / betting series.

name: ITAL-IA
description: Fixed brand — Italy regions & AI ('ITAL-IA') with category tags. Use for the recurring Italy / AI series.

name: Video Vulcanico
description: Fixed brand cover — bold volcanic branding, no editable text.

name: Dove Mangio Oggi
description: Fixed brand cover — Spain food ('dove mangio oggi?'), no editable text.
